item.description:
# CodexMate 0.0.8
- Reduced startup latency by showing a smaller recent-thread snapshot first and backfilling the full tracked list immediately after bootstrap. - Made new thread discovery feel faster by boosting refresh cadence briefly when the app starts, returns to the foreground, or opens the menu. - Avoided duplicate thread-list refreshes during bootstrap so the menu and notch no longer stall behind overlapping loads. - Added a loading placeholder for recent threads and reduced notch overlay rebuild work while the menu is closed. - Updated settings language refresh handling so localized titles change immediately, and restored the standard Command-W shortcut to close the settings window.
